task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OSCAR EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or search interface indicating a successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the chart for the correct patient, Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient's name 'Maria Santos' and DOB '27-Apr-1994' (or similar format) visible at the top of an E-Chart or patient summary screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent recorded the patient's blood pressure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '118' entered into the Systolic field and '76' entered into the Diastolic field within the vitals or measurements section of the EMR.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent recorded the patient's weight and height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '63' entered in the weight field (kg) and '167' entered in the height field (cm) within the vitals or measurements section of the EMR.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated an encounter note in the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active text box for an encounter note, progress note, or a saved note entry within Maria Santos's E-Chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the encounter note contains all required clinical details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text in the encounter note. It must mention that this is an 'annual physical', the patient is a 'healthy female in her early 30s', has a 'BMI of approximately 22.6', and there are 'no acute concerns identified'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with OSCAR EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window displaying the OSCAR EMR interface. The agent should not be using a terminal, API testing tool, or database client to insert the records.

integrity.description: Verify the vitals and notes were entered into the actual EMR fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the data inside the specific input fields, forms, or saved records of the OSCAR EMR system, rather than just typed into a separate text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent attempted to save the entered data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the note and vitals were actually saved or are in the process of being saved, such as clicking a 'Save', 'Sign', 'Add', or 'Submit' button in the EMR interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos (DOB: 1994-04-27). OSCAR EMR URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. Credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. Expected Vitals: Blood Pressure 118/76 mmHg, Weight 63 kg, Height 167 cm. The encounter note must state it is an annual physical for a healthy female in her early 30s with a BMI of approximately 22.6 and no acute concerns identified.
